creator: hcoyote@ghostar.org
text:
I approve this patch.

Additionally, I no longer have this installed anywhere so I'm unable to
give the port the attention it deserves.  Please change maintainership
to ports@freebsd.org or if RedChrom is willing, to redchrom@gmail.com.

Travis
